summary: Frontend UI presentation fixes verified for welcome.tsx and login.tsx. Both layout changes are working correctly: paddingTop:40 on actions in welcome screen creates clear breathing room, and ScrollView wrapper in login screen ensures logo is fully visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: welcome.tsx actions style has paddingTop:40 + marginBottom:40 confirmed. login.tsx uses ScrollView with contentContainerStyle flexGrow:1/justifyContent:center confirmed. Both screens render correctly on 375x667 mobile viewport.
